recommendations.title: Friday the 13th
recommendations.overview: A group of young adults visit a boarded up campsite named Crystal Lake where they soon encounter the mysterious Jason Voorhees and his deadly intentions.

recommendations.title: Pathfinder
recommendations.overview: A Viking boy is left behind after his clan battles a Native American tribe. Raised within the tribe, he ultimately becomes their savior in a fight against the Norsemen.

recommendations.title: Conan the Barbarian
recommendations.overview: A quest that begins as a personal vendetta for the fierce Cimmerian warrior soon turns into an epic battle against hulking rivals, horrific monsters, and impossible odds, as Conan realizes he is the only hope of saving the great nations of Hyboria fr

recommendations.title: Exeter
recommendations.overview: During an all-night, drug-fueled party at an abandoned asylum known for the horrific treatment of its patients, a group of ordinary teens decide to experiment with the occult, mysteriously leading to a violent possession. In an effort to find help, t

recommendations.title: Promising Young Woman
recommendations.overview: A young woman, traumatized by a tragic event in her past, seeks out vengeance against those who crossed her path.

recommendations.title: Knife in the Water
recommendations.overview: On their way to an afternoon on the lake, husband and wife Andrzej and Krystyna nearly run over a young hitchhiker. Inviting the young man onto the boat with them, Andrzej begins to subtly torment him; the hitchhiker responds by making overtures towa

recommendations.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
recommendations.overview: Bubba, an intellectually disabled man, is falsely accused of attacking a young girl. Disguised as a scarecrow, he hides in a cornfield, only to be hunted down and shot by four vigilante men. After they are acquitted due to lack of evidence, the men f

recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: An American family on holiday in Africa becomes lost in a game reserve and stalked by vicious killer lions.

recommendations.title: Hush
recommendations.overview: A deaf woman is stalked by a psychotic killer in her secluded home.

recommendations.title: The Horse Whisperer
recommendations.overview: The mother of a severely traumatized daughter enlists the aid of a unique horse trainer to help the girl's equally injured horse.
